item.title:
acaseofthegolf1: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 1h The best golf we should all be talking more about.
Hannah Green just won again at
item.description:
Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 1h The best golf we should all be talking more about.
Hannah Green just won again at the @JMEagleLAChamp
Her last five worldwide starts are:
Win MC Win Win Win
Unreal start to the year. The win today came in a 3 for 1 playoff. 5 2 60 7 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 1h Hannah Green wins for the fourth time... since March 1st. Cita LPGA @LPGA · 1h Hannah Gree
item.description: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 1h Hannah Green wins for the fourth time... since March 1st. Cita LPGA @LPGA · 1h Hannah Green in Hollywood. Again. 4 3 62 38 mil

item.description:

1976 Jan Stephenson 1999 Karrie Webb 2000 Karrie Webb 2011 Karrie Webb 2014 Karrie Webb 2026 Hannah Green 1 12 6 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 1h Hannah Green's last 5 worldwide results: Win (LPGA) Win (LET) Win (LET) Cut (Co-sanctione
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 1h Hannah Green's last 5 worldwide results: Win (LPGA) Win (LET) Win (LET) Cut (Co-sanctioned) Win (LPGA)
Pretty good rolling into the season's first major. 1 1 15 6 mil

item.title: AdamSchupak: Adam Schupak @AdamSchupak · 1h The best reveal in Matt Fitzpatrick's presser -- other than confessing he pulled his 4-ir
item.description: Adam Schupak @AdamSchupak · 1h The best reveal in Matt Fitzpatrick's presser -- other than confessing he pulled his 4-iron in the playoff -- was he didn’t even have the club in his bag for the middle two rounds and never hit it all week until drilling it into the teeth of the wind to 13 feet when it mattered. 2 5 148 17 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 1h #CRAZY SETUP — RBC Heritage winner, Matt Fitzpatrick’s bag is unique to say the least. His d
